question.question_text: How many total points will be scored in the NBA game between Brooklyn Nets and Los Angeles Lakers on 2026-03-27?
question.context: Brooklyn Nets (17-56) at Los Angeles Lakers (47-26). Regular season NBA game.

prediction.reasoning: The Lakers (47-26) are a strong team while the Nets (17-56) are one of the worst teams in the league. NBA games typically average around 220-230 total points. The Lakers play at a moderate pace and have a solid defense, while the Nets have struggled all season. However, blowout games can sometimes feature garbage time scoring that inflates totals. The Lakers at home tend to control tempo. Recent NBA scoring averages suggest a combined total around 225-230 points. Accounting for the mismatch (which can sometimes suppress scoring if the Lakers coast) and typical variance in NBA scoring, I estimate 228 total points as the most likely outcome, with reasonable spread around that based on historical game-to-game variance of roughly +/- 15-20 points at one standard deviation.
